ExaDiBenchModule.cc
1 #include "ExaDiBenchModule.h"
2 /* Author : havep at Wed Nov 14 13:29:24 2007
3  * Generated by createNew
4  */
5 
6 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/Geometry/IGeometry.h"
7 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/Geometry/PolytopicMesh/Geom3D/PolyhedralGeometry.h"
8 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/ItemGroupBuilder.h"
9 
10 #include <arcane/ITimeLoopMng.h>
11 #include <arcane/IParallelMng.h>
12 #include <arcane/utils/Limits.h>
13 #include <arcane/ArcaneVersion.h>
14 #include <arcane/IMeshSubMeshTransition.h>
15 
16 #include <stdlib.h> // pour *rand48
17 
18 #include <arcane/IMeshWriter.h>
19 #include <arcane/ServiceBuilder.h>
20 
21 /* Petite note indicative
22  * Arcane a quelques probl�mes avec les variables partielles
23  * - Si m_cell_group and utilise des RealVariable => pb (dans volumeCompute)
24  * - Si groupe isOwn possible probl�me d'enregistrement interne (Arcane) de
25  * de la variable (avec version >= 1.4.0, semble etre de meme)
26  */
27 
28 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
29 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
30 
31 void
32 ExaDiBenchModule::
33 init()
34 {
35  if(options()->exportVtk())
36  {
37  const Arcane::String fileName = mesh()->name()+Arcane::String("-vtk") ;
38  Arcane::IMeshWriter* writer = Arcane::ServiceBuilder<Arcane::IMeshWriter>::createInstance(mesh()->subDomain(),"VtkLegacyMeshWriter") ;
39  if (writer)
40  {
41  writer->writeMeshToFile(mesh(), fileName) ;
42  }
43  else
44  info() << "Writer not found" ;
45  }
46  if(options()->exportMsh())
47  {
48  const Arcane::String fileName = mesh()->name()+Arcane::String("-msh") ;
49  Arcane::IMeshWriter* writer = Arcane::ServiceBuilder<Arcane::IMeshWriter>::createInstance(mesh()->subDomain(),"MshNewMeshWriter") ;
50  if (writer)
51  {
52  writer->writeMeshToFile(mesh(), fileName) ;
53  }
54  else
55  info() << "Writer not found" ;
56  }
57  if(options()->exportIxm())
58  {
59  const Arcane::String fileName = mesh()->name()+Arcane::String("-ixm") ;
60  Arcane::IMeshWriter* writer = Arcane::ServiceBuilder<Arcane::IMeshWriter>::createInstance(mesh()->subDomain(),"IXMMeshWriter") ;
61  if (writer)
62  {
63  writer->writeMeshToFile(mesh(), fileName) ;
64  }
65  else
66  info() << "Writer not found" ;
67  }
68 
69  if(options()->refineLevel()>0)
70  {
71  refineMesh(options()->refineLevel()) ;
72  }
73 
74  m_cell_group = ownCells();
75  // m_cell_group = allCells();
76 
77  ItemGroupBuilder<Node> nodeBuilder(mesh(),"BorderNodes");
78  ItemGroupBuilder<Face> faceBuilder(mesh(),"BorderFaces");
79 
80  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface,ownFaces()) {
81  const Face face = *iface;
82  if (face.isSubDomainBoundary()) { // bord physique car own
83  nodeBuilder.add(face.nodes());
84  faceBuilder.add(face);
85 
86  // Check isSubDomainBoundaryOutside
87  if (face.isSubDomainBoundaryOutside() and face.backCell().null())
88  fatal() << "Test failed : Bad face boundary";
89  }
90  }
91 
92  m_border_node_group = nodeBuilder.buildGroup();
93  m_border_node_checker.init(m_border_node_group);
94 #if (ARCANE_VERSION<10600)
95  m_border_face_group = mesh()->faceFamily()->findGroup("OuterFaces").own();
96 #else /* ARCANE_VERSION */
97  m_border_face_group = outerFaces().own();
98 #endif /* ARCANE_VERSION */
99 
100  FaceGroup border_face_group_test = faceBuilder.buildGroup();
101  info() << "Border Node Number = " << m_border_node_group.size();
102  info() << "Border Face Number = " << m_border_face_group.size();
103  if (m_border_face_group.size() != border_face_group_test.size())
104  fatal() << "Test failed : Bad OuterFaces group";
105 
107  IGeometryMng * geom = options()->geometry();
108  geom->init();
109  geom->setPolicyTolerance(false);
110  m_geometry_policy = new NoOptimizationGeometryPolicy;
111  geom->addItemGroupProperty(allFaces(), IGeometryProperty::PArea,IGeometryProperty::PVariable);
112 
113  geom->addItemGroupProperty(allCells(), IGeometryProperty::PCenter,IGeometryProperty::PVariable);
114 
115  if (options()->useExternalStorage())
116  {
117  geom->addItemGroupProperty(m_cell_group, IGeometryProperty::PVolume,m_volumes);
118  geom->addItemGroupProperty(m_border_face_group, IGeometryProperty::PArea,m_surfaces);
119  geom->addItemGroupProperty(m_cell_group, IGeometryProperty::PCenter,m_centers);
120  }
121  else
122  {
123  geom->addItemGroupProperty(m_cell_group, IGeometryProperty::PVolume,IGeometryProperty::PVariable);
124  geom->addItemGroupProperty(m_border_face_group, IGeometryProperty::PArea,IGeometryProperty::PVariable);
125  geom->addItemGroupProperty(m_cell_group, IGeometryProperty::PCenter,IGeometryProperty::PVariable);
126  }
127 
128 // geom->update(m_geometry_policy);
129  geom->update(defaultMesh(),m_geometry_policy);
130 
131  Real area = surfaceCompute();
132  area = subDomain()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceSum,area);
133  Real volume = volumeCompute();
134  volume = subDomain()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceSum,volume);
135 
136  pinfo() << "Initial Total measure : volume = " << volume << ", area = " << area;
137  m_global_deltat = 1.;
138 
139  Real3 center = centerCompute();
140  center = subDomain()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceSum,center);
141  pinfo() << "Initial Total center = " << center[0] << " " << center[1] << " " << center[2];
142 
143  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,allCells()) {
144  m_localId[icell] = icell->localId();
145  }
146 
147 }
148 
149 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
150 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
151 
152 void
153 ExaDiBenchModule::
154 compute()
155 {
156  if(!m_border_node_checker.isValid())
157  m_border_node_checker.init(m_border_node_group);
158  const Real factor = options()->factor();
159  const Real twopi = 2. * 3.141592653589;
160 
161  VariableNodeReal3 & coords = PRIMARYMESH_CAST(mesh())->nodesCoordinates();
162  ENUMERATE_NODE(inode,ownNodes()) {
163  if (not m_border_node_checker.hasKey(*inode)) {
164 #ifdef WIN32
165  const Real r = rand()*factor;
166  const Real theta = twopi*rand();
167  const Real phi = twopi*rand();
168 #else
169  const Real r = drand48()*factor;
170  const Real theta = twopi*drand48();
171  const Real phi = twopi*drand48();
172 #endif
173  coords[inode] += r*Real3(cos(theta),sin(theta)*cos(phi),sin(theta)*sin(phi));
174  }
175  }
176 
177  coords.synchronize();
178 
179  options()->geometry()->update(m_geometry_policy);
180 
181 // ENUMERATE_NODE(inode,ownNodes()) {
182 // if (m_border_node_checker.hasKey(*inode)) {
183 // info() << "Border node " << (*inode).localId() << " " << coords[inode];
184 // }
185 // }
186 
187 // ENUMERATE_NODE(inode,ownNodes()) {
188 // if (not m_border_node_checker.hasKey(*inode)) {
189 // info() << "Inner node " << (*inode).localId() << " " << coords[inode];
190 // }
191 // }
192 
193  Real area = surfaceCompute();
194  area = subDomain()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceSum,area);
195  Real volume = volumeCompute();
196  volume = subDomain()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceSum,volume);
197  pinfo() << "Total measure : volume = " << volume << ", area = " << area;
198  Real3 center = centerCompute();
199  center = subDomain()->parallelMng()->reduce(Parallel::ReduceSum,center);
200  pinfo() << "Total center = " << center[0] << " " << center[1] << " " << center[2];
201 }
202 
203 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
204 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
205 
206 void
207 ExaDiBenchModule::
208 refineMesh(Integer level)
209 {
210  info() << "Refine Mesh : Level = "<<level;
211 
212  warning() << "Refine feature not yet implemented";
213 }
214 
215 void
216 ExaDiBenchModule::
217 restore()
218 {
219  info() << "restore";
220 }
221 
222 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
223 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
224 
225 Real
226 ExaDiBenchModule::
227 volumeCompute()
228 {
229  IGeometryMng * geomMng = options()->geometry();
230  IGeometry * geom = geomMng->geometry();
231 
232  const IGeometryMng::RealVariable & measures = geomMng->getRealVariableProperty(m_cell_group,IGeometryProperty::PVolume);
233  // const IGeometryMng::RealGroupMap & measures = geom->getRealGroupMapProperty(m_cell_group,IGeometryProperty::PVolume);
234  Real volume = 0;
235  Real maxlVolume = -FloatInfo<Real>::maxValue();
236  Real minlVolume = +FloatInfo<Real>::maxValue();
237  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,ownCells()) {
238  const Real lVolume = measures[*icell];
239  if (not math::isNearlyZero(lVolume - geom->computeMeasure(*icell))) {
240  fatal() << "Conflicting Volume measure : " << lVolume << " vs " << geom->computeMeasure(*icell) << " : diff=" << lVolume - geom->computeMeasure(*icell);
241  }
242  minlVolume = math::min(minlVolume,lVolume);
243  maxlVolume = math::max(maxlVolume,lVolume);
244  volume += lVolume;
245  }
246 
247  if (minlVolume < maxlVolume)
248  info() << "Local volume amplitude : " << minlVolume << " -> " << maxlVolume;
249  return volume;
250 }
251 
252 
253 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
254 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
255 
256 
257 Real3
258 ExaDiBenchModule::
259 centerCompute()
260 {
261  IGeometryMng * geomMng = options()->geometry();
262  IGeometry * geom = geomMng->geometry();
263 
264  const IGeometryMng::Real3Variable & centers = geomMng->getReal3VariableProperty(m_cell_group,IGeometryProperty::PCenter);
265  Real3 center(0,0,0);
266  Real3 centerCell(0,0,0);
267 
268  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,ownCells()) {
269  centerCell = geom->computeCenter(*icell);
270  const Real3 lcenter = centers[*icell];
271  if (not math::isNearlyZero(lcenter[0] - centerCell[0])
272  && not math::isNearlyZero(lcenter[1] - centerCell[1])
273  && not math::isNearlyZero(lcenter[2] - centerCell[2])
274  ) {
275  fatal() << "Conflicting Center measure : " << lcenter << " vs " << centerCell << " : diff=" << lcenter - centerCell;
276  }
277  center += lcenter;
278  }
279 
280  return center/ownCells().size();
281 }
282 
283 
284 
285 
286 Real
287 ExaDiBenchModule::
288 surfaceCompute()
289 {
290  IGeometryMng * geomMng = options()->geometry();
291  IGeometry * geom = geomMng->geometry();
292 
293  const IGeometryMng::RealVariable & measures = geomMng->getRealVariableProperty(m_border_face_group,IGeometryProperty::PArea);
294  // const IGeometryMng::RealGroupMap & measures = geom->getRealGroupMapProperty(m_border_face_group,IGeometryProperty::PArea);
295  Real area = 0;
296  Real maxlArea = -FloatInfo<Real>::maxValue();
297  Real minlArea = +FloatInfo<Real>::maxValue();
298  ENUMERATE_FACE(iface,m_border_face_group) {
299  const Real lArea = measures[*iface];
300  if (not math::isNearlyZero(lArea - geom->computeArea(*iface)))
301  fatal() << "Conflicting Area measure : " << lArea << " vs " << geom->computeArea(*iface) << " : diff=" << lArea - geom->computeArea(*iface);
302  minlArea = math::min(minlArea,lArea);
303  maxlArea = math::max(maxlArea,lArea);
304  area += lArea;
305  }
306 
307  if (minlArea < maxlArea)
308  info() << "Local area amplitude : " << minlArea << " -> " << maxlArea;
309  return area;
310 }
311 
312 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
313 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
314 using namespace Arcane;
315 ARCANE_REGISTER_MODULE_EXADIBENCH(ExaDiBenchModule);

Calcul du centre de masse.
